'''âm-b-f''' ('''mabafasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:narrow|narrow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:narrow|narrow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-b-f
|-
! Lemma
| mabafasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabafithi|mabafithi]] || [[word:mabafiji|mabafiji]] || [[word:mabafishi|mabafishi]] || [[word:mabafi|mabafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabafuthuth|mabafuthuth]] || [[word:mabafujuj|mabafujuj]] || [[word:mabafushush|mabafushush]] || [[word:mabaf|mabaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabafuthu|mabafuthu]] || [[word:mabafuju|mabafuju]] || [[word:mabafushu|mabafushu]] || [[word:mabafu|mabafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabafufuth|mabafufuth]] || [[word:mabafufuj|mabafufuj]] || [[word:mabafufush|mabafufush]] || [[word:mabafuf|mabafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabafethe|mabafethe]] || [[word:mabafeje|mabafeje]] || [[word:mabafeshe|mabafeshe]] || [[word:mabafe|mabafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabafothoth|mabafothoth]] || [[word:mabafojoj|mabafojoj]] || [[word:mabafoshosh|mabafoshosh]] || [[word:mabaf|mabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabafotho|mabafotho]] || [[word:mabafojo|mabafojo]] || [[word:mabafosho|mabafosho]] || [[word:mabafo|mabafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabafofoth|mabafofoth]] || [[word:mabafofoj|mabafofoj]] || [[word:mabafofosh|mabafofosh]] || [[word:mabafof|mabafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabafĂŠthĂŠ|mabafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mabafĂŠjĂŠ|mabafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mabafĂŠshĂŠ|mabafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mabafĂŠ|mabafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabafathath|mabafathath]] || [[word:mabafajaj|mabafajaj]] || [[word:mabafashash|mabafashash]] || [[word:mabaf|mabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabafatha|mabafatha]] || [[word:mabafaja|mabafaja]] || [[word:mabafasha|mabafasha]] || [[word:mabafa|mabafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabafafath|mabafafath]] || [[word:mabafafaj|mabafafaj]] || [[word:mabafafash|mabafafash]] || [[word:mabafaf|mabafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mabafasha|mabafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomabafasha|gomabafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimabafasha|gokimabafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mabafnĂŒsha|mabafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomabafnknĂŒsha|gomabafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimabafnĂŒsha|gokimabafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mabafshĂ«sha|mabafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomabafnkshĂ«sha|gomabafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimabafshĂ«sha|gokimabafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabafrosha|mabafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabafnkrosha|gomabafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabafrosha|gokimabafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mabafmusha|mabafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabafnkmusha|gomabafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabafmusha|gokimabafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mabafsherasha|mabafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomabafnksherasha|gomabafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimabafsherasha|gokimabafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mabafngasha|mabafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomabafnkngasha|gomabafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimabafngasha|gokimabafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mabafyasha|mabafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomabafnkyasha|gomabafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimabafyasha|gokimabafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mabafyamasha|mabafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomabafnkyamasha|gomabafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimabafyamasha|gokimabafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabafnĂŒshĂ«sha|mabafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomabafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimabafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabafnĂŒrosha|mabafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabafnknĂŒrosha|gomabafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabafnĂŒrosha|gokimabafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabafnĂŒmusha|mabafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabafnknĂŒmusha|gomabafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabafnĂŒmusha|gokimabafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabafshĂ«nĂŒsha|mabafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomabafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimabafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabafshĂ«rosha|mabafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabafnkshĂ«rosha|gomabafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabafshĂ«rosha|gokimabafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabafshĂ«musha|mabafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabafnkshĂ«musha|gomabafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabafshĂ«musha|gokimabafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabafronĂŒsha|mabafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabafnkronĂŒsha|gomabafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabafronĂŒsha|gokimabafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabafroshĂ«sha|mabafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabafnkroshĂ«sha|gomabafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabafroshĂ«sha|gokimabafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabafromusha|mabafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabafnkromusha|gomabafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabafromusha|gokimabafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabafmunĂŒsha|mabafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabafnkmunĂŒsha|gomabafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabafmunĂŒsha|gokimabafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabafmushĂ«sha|mabafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabafnkmushĂ«sha|gomabafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabafmushĂ«sha|gokimabafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabafmurosha|mabafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabafnkmurosha|gomabafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabafmurosha|gokimabafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mabaf|mabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠf|mĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homabaf|homabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠbĂŠf|homĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomabaf|hohomabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠbĂŠf|hohomĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmabaf|nĂŒmabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠbĂŠf|nĂŒmĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmabaf|nĂŒnĂŒmabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠbĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmabaf|nĂŻmabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠbĂŠf|nĂŻmĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmabaf|nĂŻnĂŻmabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠbĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumabaf|lumabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠbĂŠf|lumĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumabaf|lulumabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠbĂŠf|lulumĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limabaf|limabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠbĂŠf|limĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimabaf|lilimabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠbĂŠf|lilimĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komabaf|komabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠbĂŠf|komĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomabaf|kokomabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠbĂŠf|kokomĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemabaf|kemabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠbĂŠf|kemĂŠbĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemabaf|kekemabaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠbĂŠf|kekemĂŠbĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
